Luther, Leslie L., collector and compiler, Moravia area items

titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Leslie L. Luther, collector and compiler, Moravia area items,

physdesc.label: Quantity:
physdesc.extent: .4 cubic ft., 3 reels positive, 2 reels negative microfilm

did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Alphabetized tombstone inscriptions; scrapbook of newspaper clippings, sketches, and notes; genealogical data; and a copy of a journal kept by William Slade.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Alphabetized tombstone inscriptions for cemeteries in the Towns of Locke, Genoa, Moravia, Niles, Scipio, Sempronius, Summer Hill, and Venice in Cayuga County and for the Van Etten Cemetery in the Town of Skaneateles, Onondaga County, New York; scrapbook of newspaper clippings (1921-58), sketches, and notes concerning people, events, and churches and other institutions in central New York (1794); genealogical data on the Alley (Allee), Luther, Spafford, Sparks, Youngs, Thayer, and Sawyer families; and a copy of a journal (1824) kept by William Slade during a journey from Sempronius to Swansea, Massachusetts.

controlaccess.head: Places:
controlaccess.geogname: Cayuga County (N.Y.) -- Social life and customs.
Onondaga County (N.Y.) -- Social life and customs.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Leslie L. Luther, collector and compiler, Moravia area items, #1934. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
